creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Support for pc98 has been completely removed:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=312910

It's still listed at:
https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/
https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/pc98.html
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/archs.html

among others ...
